title: Puer Cï؟½ruleus.
content:
Little Boy Blue, come blow your horn,
	 The cowï؟½s in the meadow, the sheep in the corn.
	 Whereï؟½s the little boy that looks after the sheep?
	 Under the haycock fast asleep.

	آ آ آ آ Cï؟½rule parve puer, cornu nunc suscipe cantum.
	آ آ آ آ Per segetes errant pecudes, per pascua vaccï؟½.
	آ آ آ آ Ah, ubi nunc ovium custos tam parvulus absit?
	آ آ آ آ En, gregis oblitus sub fï؟½no dormit opaco.
meaning:
Jacob Bigelow's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Puer Cï؟½ruleus."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
